tasks.check: deno check router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts src/**/*.ts packages/**/*.ts
tasks.fmt: deno fmt router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts setup.ts examples src packages README.md docs deno.json
tasks.lint: deno lint router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts setup.ts examples src packages
tasks.lock: deno cache --lock=deno.lock router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts
tasks.lock:check: deno cache --lock=deno.lock --frozen router.ts router_test.ts doctor.ts setup.ts examples/**/*.ts
